title: Registration Of Students On The Urise Placement Portal
content: Ms. Neha Srivastava                       Dr. A.P .J. Abdul Kalam Technical University Deputy Controller of Examination                                            Uttar Pradesh, Lucknow                                                                                                     Sector-11, Jankipuram Extension,    Ref: AKTU/CTPC/2026/1372 25 June, 2026 To, The Directors/Principals All Affiliated Institutions of AKTU, Uttar Pradesh Subject: Registration of Students on the URISE Placement Portal Sir/Madam, All students of the University are hereby informed that the URISE Placement Portal has been developed to facilitate access to placement opportunities, internships, career-related services, and recruitment drives. In order to avail these opportunities and remain updated regarding placement activities, all students are advised to register themselves on the URISE Placement Portal at the earliest using the link provided below: Registration Link: https://urise.up.gov.in/student/register   Steps for Registration 1. Click on the registration link mentioned above. 2. Select "AKTU" as your University. 3. Enter your Roll Number. 4. Enter your Date of Birth (DOB). 5. Click on "Register" to complete the registration process. All Directors/Principals of affiliated and constituent institutions are requested to disseminate this information among students and ensure maximum student registration on the portal latest by 30 June 2026. Students are advised to treat this matter as important and complete their registration at the earliest.  Best wishes,                     (Neha Srivastava)  Copy to:  (1) Registrar, AKTU, Lucknow (2) Finance Officer, AKTU, Lucknow (3) Staff Officer to Hon’ble  Vice Chancellor for kind information      (Neha Srivastava)

title: About DBGI Saharanpur Campus & History
content: Dev Bhoomi Group Of Institutions(DBGI) Saharanpur campus established in the year 2009 is a premier group of institutions of Uttarakhand Uthan Samiti, a non-profit Society, professionally managed by the Eminent Academicians, Industrialists and Scientists. Keeping in tune with the upsurge in technical developments, the Samiti being committed to the cause of quality education and has established Six Temples of Learning and Innovations. DBGI is one of the best developing engineering colleges of Saharanpur district. The Campus is about 4 Km from Civil Hospital towards D.M. Residence at Beri Jama, Saharanpur. The nearest Airport is Jollygrant about 95 KMs from the Institute. The sprawling main campus is spread in one piece of land of 150 Bighas (22 acres), in the surroundings of greeneries, flora & fauna besides the National Forest.

title: Courses Offered at DBGI Saharanpur
content:
DBGI Saharanpur offers a wide range of professional courses in Engineering, Management, Computer Applications, Pharmacy, and Polytechnic. Featured programs include:
- Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharm)
- Diploma in Electrical Engineering
- Diploma in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE)
- Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (Production)

title: DBGI Saharanpur Careers & Staff Recruitment Requirements
content:
Staff & Recruitment Qualifications/Requirements at DBGI Saharanpur:
- **HOD/Prof. :**: B.TECH AND POLYTECHNIC (CIVIL/EEE/ME/ECE/CS/IT), MBA, MCA, BBA, BCA, B.Com, B.Pharm, D.Pharm
- **Assot. Prof. :**: B. TECH (CIVIL/EEE/ME/ECE/CS/IT/), MBA, MCA, BBA, BCA, B.Com, B.Pharm, D.Pharm
- **Asst. Prof.:**: B. TECH (CIVIL/EEE/ME/ECE/CS/IT/), MBA, MCA, BBA, BCA, B.Com, B.Pharm, D.Pharm
- **Prof./Assot.Prof./Asst.Prof.**: :                   Applied Science (Physics/Maths/Chemistry/English with Ph.D.)
- **Principal for Polytechnic Institute:**: B.Tech with M.Tech Degree (with relevant experience)
- **Registrar –**: Post Graduate with a minimum of six years of relevant experience
- **Sub Registrar –**: Post Graduate with a minimum of three years of experience
- **Examination Head-**: A Prof. with relevant experience of 10 years
- **Admin Officer-**: A well-spoken graduate with basic knowledge of computer (MBA will be preferred)
- **Mechanical Transport Officer**: – Well experienced (Man with Army background will be preferred)
- **Technical / Support Staff: –**: Lab Technicians, Hostel Warden, Clerks/Office Assistants, , System Administrator/Networking Engineers, Computer Lab Technicians, and Peons.
